question: Hello
cypher: RETURN "Hello! I'm a knowledge assistant focused on folktales from all around the world. You can ask me about their characters, relationships, themes or how they are structured." AS ground_truth

question: What can you do?
cypher: RETURN "I can answer questions about folktales: their narrative structure, the characters that make them up and their features, the relevant places and objects that appear, among others." AS ground_truth

question: What is the weather like today?
cypher: RETURN "This question is outside my scope." AS ground_truth

question: Who won the last football World Cup?
cypher: RETURN "This question is outside my scope." AS ground_truth

question: What is the capital of France?
cypher: RETURN 'This question is outside my scope.' AS ground_truth

question: Which movies did Momotaro appear in?
cypher: RETURN "This question is outside my scope." AS ground_truth

question: What is Momotaro's last name?
cypher: RETURN "This information is not in the knowledge base." AS ground_truth

question: What is Momotaro's exact age?
cypher: RETURN "This information is not in the knowledge base." AS ground_truth

question: What is the population of the town in 'Sharing Joy and Sorrow'?
cypher: RETURN "This information is not in the knowledge base." AS ground_truth

question: What is the cock's favorite food in 'The Thieves and the Rooster'?
cypher: RETURN "This information is not in the knowledge base." AS ground_truth

question: List all Genre nodes in the graph
cypher: MATCH (g:Genre) RETURN g.name AS ground_truth ORDER BY g.name

question: How many Folktale nodes are in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale) RETURN toString(count(f)) + " folktale(s)" AS ground_truth

question: How many Event nodes are in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (e:Event) RETURN toString(count(e)) + " event(s)" AS ground_truth

question: How many Agent nodes are in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent) RETURN toString(count(a)) + " agent(s)" AS ground_truth

question: How many Place nodes are in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (p:Place) RETURN toString(count(p)) + " place(s)" AS ground_truth

question: How many Object nodes are in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (o:Object) RETURN toString(count(o)) + " place(s)" AS ground_truth

question: How many typed relationships exist in the graph?
cypher: MATCH ()-[r]->() RETURN toString(count(r)) + " relationship(s)" AS ground_truth

question: What is the nationality to which the folktale 'The Birdcatcher' belongs?
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale {title: "The Birdcatcher"})-[:FROM_NATION]->(n:Nation) RETURN n.name AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: Where does the birdcatcher live?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent)-[:LIVES_IN]->(p:Place) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS "birdcatcher" RETURN p.name AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: What race is Momotaro?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS "momotaro" RETURN a.race AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: What type of place is Constantinople?
cypher: MATCH (p:Place) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS "constantinople" RETURN p.type AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: Who is the tailor in the folktale 'Sharing Joy and Sorrow'?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS "tailor" RETURN a.description AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: What is the description of The Magistrates' Court?
cypher: MATCH (p:Place) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS "court" RETURN p.description AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: What is the genre of the 'Momotaro' folktale?
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale {title: "Momotaro"})-[:HAS_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: What is the gender of the birdcatcher?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS "birdcatcher" RETURN a.gender AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: How did Momotaro convince the animals to join him on his journey?
cypher: RETURN "Momotaro convinced the animals by sharing his kibidango (millet dumplings) with them."

question: What is Momotaro's role in the folktale?
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale {title: "Momotaro"})-[:HAS_EVENT]->(:Event)-[:HAS_AGENT]->(a:Agent {name: "Momotaro"})-[:HAS_ROLE]->(r:Role) RETURN r.name AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: List all the events in the folktale 'The Thieves and the Cock'
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale {title: "The Thieves and the Cock"})-[:HAS_EVENT]->(e:Event) RETURN e.name AS ground_truth ORDER BY e.name

question: Which Event nodes take place in Constantinople?
cypher: MATCH (e:Event)-[:TAKES_PLACE_IN]->(p) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS 'constantinople' RETURN DISTINCT e.name AS ground_truth

question: Who are Momotaro's friends?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent)-[r]->(b:Agent) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS "momotaro" AND r.type = "friend" RETURN DISTINCT b.name AS ground_truth

question: Which characters appear in 'The Thieves and the Cock'?
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale {title: "The Thieves and the Cock"})-[:HAS_EVENT]->(:Event)-[:HAS_AGENT]->(a:Agent) RETURN DISTINCT a.name AS ground_truth

question: What are the main personality traits of the tiger character ranked by strength?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent)-[r:HAS_TRAIT]->(t:Trait) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS "tiger" RETURN t.name + ' (' + toString(r.strength) + ')' AS ground_truth ORDER BY r.strength DESC LIMIT 5

question: Give me the first 3 events of 'How the Tiger Got Its Stripes'
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale {title: "How the Tiger Got His Stripes"})-[:HAS_EVENT]->(e:Event) RETURN e.name AS ground_truth ORDER BY e.order ASC LIMIT 3

question: What happened to Momotaro and his companions when they were in The Ogres' Castle?
cypher: MATCH (p:Place)<-[:TAKES_PLACE_IN]-(e:Event) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS "ogres' castle" RETURN e.description AS ground_truth ORDER BY e.order

question: What happens after the tailor was put in prison?
cypher: MATCH (f:Folktale)-[:HAS_EVENT]->(e1:Event)-[:POST_EVENT]->(e2:Event) WHERE toLower(e1.description) CONTAINS "prison" AND toLower(e1.description) CONTAINS "tailor" RETURN e2.description AS ground_truth LIMIT 1

question: Which are the 3 most important characters based on the number of events they appear in?
cypher: MATCH (a:Agent)<-[:HAS_AGENT]-(e:Event) RETURN a.name AS ground_truth, count(e) AS event_count ORDER BY event_count DESC LIMIT 3
